note: Scaled recency based on the share of annual posts published after the user's last comment: up to 20% of the feed still indicates proximity to the active edge; beyond 50% means the user has missed most of the annual feed.

Absolute frequency based on annual distinct-post count: 1 means the user's eligible annual activity is concentrated on a single post, 2 to 3 means participation spreads across a few posts, and 4 or more distinct posts indicate broader yearly presence.
Up to about 5 words comments remain short and reactive; above about 10 words they become clearly more elaborated and discursive.
